form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 47-day let-up. First-up after two months 5th of 11 at Yesiloba All Weather on February 28 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Aramith carrying 63kg at $6.05. Previously second-up scored a big 9 len win at this track May 24 over 1500m defeating Celebrimbor carrying 57.5kg at $4.80. Likely improver.

form.formComment: Last start won by 10 len at Yesiloba All Weather March 24 over 1500m defeating Back To Glory carrying 58kg at $2.25. Before that ran last in a small field at Yesiloba All Weather on March 14 over 1400m, 18 len behind Zagros Ruzgari carrying 58kg at $7.10. Big chance to make it back-to-back successes.
